Onboarding KYC Ready Geo Listing

Professional Profile Intake

This registration layer captures all required legal professional details for onboarding into the Legalnomics partner network and geo-discovery system.

Registration Form

Profile Weightage Inputs

  • Bar Council verified advocates get stronger trust ranking
  • Years of experience affect premium lead eligibility
  • Staff size helps route higher-volume consultation loads
  • Pincode / Zip enables nearby discovery and geo matching
  • Junior advocates can receive starter consultation leads
  • Notary-enabled professionals can appear in document workflows
